caption: A man with short dark hair and a blue button-down shirt stands against a dark background in front of a white wall featuring the logos "the CUBE" and "silicon ANGLE". He wears a thin headset microphone and speaks throughout the sequence. A blue lower-third graphic appears across the middle of the screen, identifying him as "RISHI YADAV | @meditativesoul", "CEO", and "infoObjects". In one instance, a small logo for "#BigDataSV" is also visible on the graphic. As the video progresses, the blue graphic disappears, and a small orange "INFO OBJECTS" logo appears in the bottom left corner. The man gestures with his hands while speaking, moving them in front of his chest. A dark object, possibly a notebook or tablet, sits on a surface in front of him in the final segments of the clip.
